name: Incognito
summary: Recover intel from Hunter's Paradise without alerting the Lotus Circle.
description: Move quietly into Hunter's Paradise, locate the marked stash, and recover the intel package. Avoid drawing attention from Lotus Circle patrols. Extract via the southern LZ.

name: Business or Pleasure
summary: Investigate hostile group movements at the Sapphire compound.
description: Reach the Sapphire compound, identify hostile signal repeaters, and tag them for follow-up by Mithras assets.

name: Fort Narith Stroll
summary: Recon Fort Narith airfield approach without engaging.
description: Sweep the Fort Narith airfield entrance, photograph defensive positions, exfil clean.

name: Lamang Connection
summary: Recover bio-research intel from Blue Lagoon.
description: Find the UNLRA research dossier dropped near Blue Lagoon. Recover before the next storm cycle.

name: Supply Chain
summary: Repeatable: deliver 5 medkits to the Banshee dropoff.
description: Stock up on medkits and drop them at the rotating Banshee deadbox.
